title: Technical Cleanup Day 3 (Phase 13C.4)

checks.sitemap_no_noindex_urls: ✅ PASS — No noindex URLs detected in sitemap sample. Cleanup-lag URLs (~2,972) are NOT in sitemap.
checks.sitemap_no_404: ⚠️ MINOR — 3 dashboard URLs return 307 redirect (auth-gated). Not a critical issue since Google handles 307 correctly, but consider removing auth-only pages from sitemap.
checks.guide_canonicals_working: ✅ PASS — All guides have self-referencing canonicals (fixed Jun 3 Phase 13C.3).
checks.comparison_canonicals_working: ✅ PASS — 35/35 comparison pages verified: HTTP 200, robots index,follow, self-referencing www canonical.
checks.news_sitemap_valid: ✅ PASS — 97 URLs, valid XML, no Google News namespace (correct).
checks.robots_txt_correct: ✅ PASS — 2 sitemaps declared (main + news). No scenario sitemap. Allow: / for all agents.
checks.scenario_sitemap_not_submitted: ✅ PASS — Not in robots.txt. Not in GSC.
checks.no_accidental_noindex: ✅ PASS — Priority pages (calcs, compare, guides, blog, decision, widget, homepage) all index,follow.
checks.no_broken_calculator_links: ✅ PASS — All 10 core calculators 200 OK, confirmed indexed.
checks.no_duplicate_titles: ⚠️ NOTE — Metadata merge issue (pitfall #41): Next.js root layout metadata overrides page-level alternates.canonical. og:title still shows site default on some pages. Non-critical for indexing but suboptimal for social sharing.

issues.issue: 3 dashboard URLs in sitemap return 307 redirects
issues.recommendation: Exclude auth-gated pages from sitemap or mark with noindex. Not urgent — 307 is handled correctly by Google.
issues.action_taken: Noted for next sitemap cleanup pass

risky_automations_status: ALL PAUSED — Confirmed 6 crons paused. No re-enables.
